narrative: Iran tensions and Hormuz attacks introduce a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges toward $105; USD/JPY holds at 157.24 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand. Gold lower -0.13% near $4,528; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.33%; VIX 18.3. AUD/USD at 0.7169 faces a -35bp carry disadvantage ahead of today's RBA decision. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC.
